title: [codereview-pass3] coap_dtn.c missing OSCORE as specified in parent project-LICHEN-2h1i.2.4.2; plain CoAP only
description: lichen/subsys/lichen/coap/coap_dtn.c:12 - Includes oscore.h and senml.h but neither is used. Parent requires OSCORE for /deaddrop and /confessions. Critical completeness bug. CODEREVIEW
